import React, { useState } from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; const Dashboard = () => { const [darkMode] = useState(false); // Theme switch will be added later const username = localStorage.getItem('username'); const token = localStorage.getItem('accessToken'); const [info, setInfo] = useState({}); const [error, setError] = useState(''); return (

📊 School Management Dashboard

Hi, {username} 👋

Welcome, {username}

👤 My Info

Email: {info.email || 'Loading...'}

Class: {info.classroom || 'N/A'}

Subjects: {(info.subjects || []).join(', ') || 'No subjects yet'}

📚 Students

Manage all registered students.

👨‍🏫 Teachers

View and update teacher records.

📘 Subjects

Explore subjects offered by the school.

🏫 Classrooms

Assign students and teachers to classes.

📅 Timetable

Manage class schedules and time slots.

✅ Attendance

Track daily attendance records.

🏅 Grades

Enter and view student grades.

); }; export default Dashboard;
